c.d: Total number of active monthly users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App analytics platforms, company reports, market research data

c.d: Average number of successful sales transactions processed monthly, showing platform effectiveness
c.s: Platform financial reports, third-party market analysis, industry statistics

c.d: Percentage of sale price charged as commission plus any fixed fees, impacting seller profit margins

c.d: Breadth and depth of supported item categories, from general marketplace to niche-specific platforms
c.s: Platform category listings, seller guidelines, market positioning

c.d: User experience rating for creating listings, including photo upload, description tools, and posting flow
c.s: User reviews, UX analysis, platform interface evaluation, seller feedback
